task_completion.description: Perform a multiple sequence alignment on the provided influenza HA strains using the MAFFT L-INS-i strategy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE interface showing the loaded influenza_HA_strains.fasta file and the Multiple Sequence Alignment window with aligned sequences, ideally showing MAFFT alignment settings.

task_completion.description: Create annotations named 'conserved_epitope' in the 'vaccine_targets' group for identified regions of at least 9 consecutive amino acids.
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE sequence view or annotations panel showing new annotations specifically named 'conserved_epitope' grouped under 'vaccine_targets', spanning 9 or more residues.

task_completion.description: Include a /note qualifier for each 'conserved_epitope' annotation describing the conservation level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE Annotation editor or properties panel displaying a '/note' qualifier with conservation percentage or level text for the created annotations.

task_completion.description: Export the consensus sequence to HA_consensus.fasta in the results directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer, terminal window, or UGENE export dialog showing the creation of 'HA_consensus.fasta' in '~/UGENE_Data/vaccine/results/'.

task_completion.description: Export the annotated alignment in ClustalW format (.aln) and Stockholm format (.sto) to the results directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer or terminal showing 'HA_alignment_annotated.aln' and 'HA_alignment.sto' in '~/UGENE_Data/vaccine/results/'.

task_completion.description: Create a vaccine target report listing position ranges, consensus sequences, conservation percentages, a top 3 ranking, and total epitopes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing 'epitope_report.txt' containing the required fields: position range, consensus sequence, conservation percentage, top 3 candidates ranked, and the total count of conserved epitopes.

integrity.description: The agent used the UGENE GUI to perform the alignment and create annotations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show active interaction with the UGENE application windows, menus, and dialogs, rather than just terminal commands or Python scripts bypassing the UI.

integrity.description: The alignment and consensus files were generated by the software's export functions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of UGENE export dialogs or file contents that match standard bioinformatics software output formats, rather than manually typed mock files.

integrity.description: The epitope_report.txt contains specific data derived from the actual alignment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file contains specific amino acid sequences, positions, and percentages that correlate with the UGENE workspace, rather than generic placeholder text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The FASTA file contains fabricated sequences making true >80% structural conservation across all 12 strains impossible. Do not penalize the agent for biological inaccuracy; verify correctness strictly based on the creation of annotations spanning >=9 residues and the successful export of the requested files.
